# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cryptographic weaknesses and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify predictable randomness, weak algorithms/modes, hardcoded keys, and insecure key storage.
4. Replace weak cryptographic patterns with secure randomness, modern algorithms, and proper key management.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: Secure User Authentication
 * Description: WordPress user authentication plugin with secure password hashing
 * Version: 2.0
 * Author: Security Team
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class SecureUserAuthentication {
    
    private $table_name;
    private $pepper;
    
    public function __construct() {
        global $wpdb;
        $this->table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'secure_users';
        
        // Generate and store pepper securely if not exists
        $this->pepper = $this->get_or_create_pepper();
        
        add_action('admin_menu', array($this, 'add_admin_menu'));
        add_action('init', array($this, 'handle_registration'));
        add_action('init', array($this, 'handle_login'));
        add_action('init', array($this, 'handle_logout'));
        add_shortcode('secure_registration_form', array($this, 'registration_form'));
        add_shortcode('secure_login_form', array($this, 'login_form'));
        
        register_activation_hook(__FILE__, array($this, 'activate'));
    }
    
    private function get_or_create_pepper() {
        $pepper_option = 'secure_auth_pepper';
        $pepper = get_option($pepper_option);
        
        if (!$pepper) {
            // Generate cryptographically secure random pepper
            $pepper = bin2hex(random_bytes(32));
            update_option($pepper_option, $pepper, false);
        }
        
        return $pepper;
    }
    
    public function activate() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $charset_collate = $wpdb->get_charset_collate();
        
        $sql = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {$this->table_name} (
            id bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            username varchar(60) NOT NULL,
            email varchar(100) NOT NULL,
            password_hash varchar(255) NOT NULL,
            created_at datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            last_login datetime NULL,
            failed_attempts int DEFAULT 0,
            lockout_until datetime NULL,
            PRIMARY KEY (id),
            UNIQUE KEY username (username),
            UNIQUE KEY email (email)
        ) $charset_collate;";
        
        require_once(ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/upgrade.php');
        dbDelta($sql);
    }
    
    public function add_admin_menu() {
        add_menu_page(
            'Secure Auth Users',
            'Secure Auth',
            'manage_options',
            'secure-auth-users',
            array($this, 'admin_page'),
            'dashicons-lock',
            30
        );
    }
    
    public function admin_page() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $users = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT id, username, email, created_at, last_login FROM {$this->table_name} ORDER BY created_at DESC");
        
        echo '<div class="wrap">';
        echo '<h1>Secure Authentication Users</h1>';
        echo '<table class="wp-list-table widefat fixed striped">';
        echo '<thead><tr><th>ID</th><th>Username</th><th>Email</th><th>Created</th><th>Last Login</th></tr></thead>';
        echo '<tbody>';
        
        foreach ($users as $user) {
            echo '<tr>';
            echo '<td>' . esc_html($user->id) . '</td>';
            echo '<td>' . esc_html($user->username) . '</td>';
            echo '<td>' . esc_html($user->email) . '</td>';
            echo '<td>' . esc_html($user->created_at) . '</td>';
            echo '<td>' . esc_html($user->last_login ?: 'Never') . '</td>';
            echo '</tr>';
        }
        
        echo '</tbody></table>';
        echo '</div>';
    }
    
    private function hash_password($password) {
        // Add pepper to password before hashing
        $peppered_password = hash_hmac('sha256', $password, $this->pepper);
        
        // Use Argon2id (most secure) if available, fallback to bcrypt
        if (defined('PASSWORD_ARGON2ID')) {
            return password_hash($peppered_password, PASSWORD_ARGON2ID, [
                'memory_cost' => 65536,
                'time_cost' => 4,
                'threads' => 3
            ]);
        } else {
            return password_hash($peppered_password, PASSWORD_BCRYPT, [
                'cost' => 12
            ]);
        }
    }
    
    private function verify_password($password, $hash) {
        $peppered_password = hash_hmac('sha256', $password, $this->pepper);
        return password_verify($peppered_password, $hash);
    }
    
    private function is_account_locked($user) {
        if ($user->lockout_until && strtotime($user->lockout_until) > time()) {
            return true;
        }
        return false;
    }
    
    private function increment_failed_attempts($user_id) {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $wpdb->query($wpdb->prepare(
            "UPDATE {$this->table_name} SET failed_attempts = failed_attempts + 1 WHERE id = %d",
            $user_id
        ));
        
        $user = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT failed_attempts FROM {$this->table_name} WHERE id = %d",
            $user_id
        ));
        
        // Lock account for 15 minutes after 5 failed attempts
        if ($user->failed_attempts >= 5) {
            $lockout_time = date('Y-m-d H:i:s', time() + 900);
            $wpdb->update(
                $this->table_name,
                array('lockout_until' => $lockout_time),
                array('id' => $user_id),
                array('%s'),
                array('%d')
            );
        }
    }
    
    private function reset_failed_attempts($user_id) {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $wpdb->update(
            $this->table_name,
            array('failed_attempts' => 0, 'lockout_until' => null),
            array('id' => $user_id),
            array('%d', '%s'),
            array('%d')
        );
    }
    
    public function handle_registration() {
        if (!isset($_POST['secure_auth_register']) || !isset($_POST['secure_auth_register_nonce'])) {
            return;
        }
        
        if (!wp_verify_nonce($_POST['secure_auth_register_nonce'], 'secure_auth_register_action')) {
            wp_die('Security check failed');
        }
        
        $username = sanitize_user($_POST['username']);
        $email = sanitize_email($_POST['email']);
        $password = $_POST['password'];
        $confirm_password = $_POST['confirm_password'];
        
        $errors = array();
        
        if (empty($username) || strlen($username) < 3) {
            $errors[] = 'Username must be at least 3 characters';
        }
        
        if (!is_email($email)) {
            $errors[] = 'Invalid email address';
        }
        
        if (strlen($password) < 8) {
            $errors[] = 'Password must be at least 8 characters';
        }
        
        if (!preg_match('/[A-Z]/', $password)) {
            $errors[] = 'Password must contain at least one uppercase letter';
        }
        
        if (!preg_match('/[a-z]/', $password)) {
            $errors[] = 'Password must contain at least one lowercase letter';
        }
        
        if (!preg_match('/[0-9]/', $password)) {
            $errors[] = 'Password must contain at least one number';
        }
        
        if (!preg_match('/[^A-Za-z0-9]/', $password)) {
            $errors[] = 'Password must contain at least one special character';
        }
        
        if ($password !== $confirm_password) {
            $errors[] = 'Passwords do not match';
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        
        $existing_user = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT id FROM {$this->table_name} WHERE username = %s OR email = %s",
            $username,
            $email
        ));
        
        if ($existing_user) {
            $errors[] = 'Username or email already exists';
        }
        
        if (!empty($errors)) {
            set_transient('secure_auth_errors', $errors, 30);
            wp_redirect(wp_get_referer());
            exit;
        }
        
        $password_hash = $this->hash_password($password);
        
        $result = $wpdb->insert(
            $this->table_name,
            array(
                'username' => $username,
                'email' => $email,
                'password_hash' => $password_hash
            ),
            array('%s', '%s', '%s')
        );
        
        if ($result) {
            set_transient('secure_auth_success', 'Registration successful! Please login.', 30);
            wp_redirect(wp_get_referer());
            exit;
        } else {
            set_transient('secure_auth_errors', array('Registration failed. Please try again.'), 30);
            wp_redirect(wp_get_referer());
            exit;
        }
    }
    
    public function handle_login() {
        if (!isset($_POST['secure_auth_login']) || !isset($_POST['secure_auth_login_nonce'])) {
            return;
        }
        
        if (!wp_verify_nonce($_POST['secure_auth_login_nonce'], 'secure_auth_login_action')) {
            wp_die('Security check failed');
        }
        
        $username = sanitize_user($_POST['username']);
        $password = $_POST['password'];
        
        global $wpdb;
        
        $user = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT * FROM {$this->table_name} WHERE username = %s",
            $username
        ));
        
        if (!$user) {
            // Use constant-time comparison to prevent user enumeration
            $dummy_hash = $this->hash_password('dummy_password_' . bin2hex(random_bytes(16)));
            $this->verify_password($password, $dummy_hash);
            
            set_transient('secure_auth_errors', array('Invalid username or password'), 30);
            wp_redirect(wp_get_referer());
            exit;
        }
        
        if ($this->is_account_locked($user)) {
            set_transient('secure_auth_errors', array('Account is temporarily locked due to multiple failed login attempts'), 30);
            wp_redirect(wp_get_referer());
            exit;
        }
        
        if ($this->verify_password($password, $user->password_hash)) {
            $this->reset_failed_attempts($user->id);
            
            // Update last login
            $wpdb->update(
                $this->table_name,
                array('last_login' => current_time('mysql')),
                array('id' => $user->id),
                array('%s'),
                array('%d')
            );
            
            // Generate secure session token
            $session_token = bin2hex(random_bytes(32));
            
            // Set secure session
            if (!session_id()) {
                session_start([
                    'cookie_httponly' => true,
                    'cookie_secure' => is_ssl(),
                    'cookie_samesite' => 'Strict'
                ]);
            }
            
            $_SESSION['secure_auth_user_id'] = $user->id;
            $_SESSION['secure_auth_username'] = $user->username;
            $_SESSION['secure_auth_token'] = $session_token;
            $_SESSION['secure_auth_ip'] = $_SERVER['REMOTE_ADDR'];
            $_SESSION['secure_auth_user_agent'] = $_SERVER['HTTP_USER_AGENT'];
            
            set_transient('secure_auth_success', 'Login successful!', 30);
            wp_redirect(home_url());
            exit;
        } else {
            $this->increment_failed_attempts($user->id);
            set_transient('secure_auth_errors', array('Invalid username or password'), 30);
            wp_redirect(wp_get_referer());
            exit;
        }
    }
    
    public function handle_logout() {
        if (!isset($_GET['secure_auth_logout']) || !isset($_GET['_wpnonce'])) {
            return;
        }
        
        if (!wp_verify_nonce($_GET['_wpnonce'], 'secure_auth_logout')) {
            wp_die('Security check failed');
        }
        
        if (session_id()) {
            session_destroy();
        }
        
        set_transient('secure_auth_success', 'Logged out successfully', 30);
        wp_redirect(home_url());
        exit;
    }
    
    private function is_logged_in() {
        if (!session_id()) {
            session_start([
                'cookie_httponly' => true,
                'cookie_secure' => is_ssl(),
                'cookie_samesite' => 'Strict'
            ]);
        }
        
        if (!isset($_SESSION['secure_auth_user_id'])) {
            return false;
        }
        
        // Validate session integrity
        if ($_SESSION['secure_auth_ip'] !== $_SERVER['REMOTE_ADDR'] ||
            $_SESSION['secure_auth_user_agent'] !== $_SERVER['HTTP_USER_AGENT']) {
            session_destroy();
            return false;
        }
        
        return true;
    }
    
    public function registration_form() {
        if ($this->is_logged_in()) {
            return '<p>You are already logged in. <a href="' . esc_url(wp_nonce_url(add_query_arg('secure_auth_logout', '1'), 'secure_auth_logout')) . '">Logout</a></p>';
        }
        
        $errors = get_transient('secure_auth_errors');
        $success = get_transient('secure_auth_success');
        
        delete_transient('secure_auth_errors');
        delete_transient('secure_auth_success');
        
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="secure-auth-form">
            <?php if ($errors): ?>
                <div class="secure-auth-errors">
                    <?php foreach ($errors as $error): ?>
                        <p style="color: red;"><?php echo esc_html($error); ?></p>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>
            
            <?php if ($success): ?>
                <div class="secure-auth-success">
                    <p style="color: green;"><?php echo esc_html($success); ?></p>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>
            
            <form method="post" action="">
                <?php wp_nonce_field('secure_auth_register_action', 'secure_auth_register_nonce'); ?>
                
                <p>
                    <label for="username">Username:</label><br>
                    <input type="text" name="username" id="username" required>
                </p>
                
                <p>
                    <label for="email">Email:</label><br>
                    <input type="email" name="email" id="email" required>
                </p>
                
                <p>
                    <label for="password">Password:</label><br>
                    <input type="password" name="password" id="password" required>
                    <small>Min 8 characters, must include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character</small>
                </p>
                
                <p>
                    <label for="confirm_password">Confirm Password:</label><br>
                    <input type="password" name="confirm_password" id="confirm_password" required>
                </p>
                
                <p>
                    <input type="submit" name="secure_auth_register" value="Register">
                </p>
            </form>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }
    
    public function login_form() {
        if ($this->is_logged_in()) {
            return '<p>You are already logged in as ' . esc_html($_SESSION['secure_auth_username']) . '. <a href="' . esc_url(wp_nonce_url(add_query_arg('secure_auth_logout', '1'), 'secure_auth_logout')) . '">Logout</a></p>';
        }
        
        $errors = get_transient('secure_auth_errors');
        $success = get_transient('secure_auth_success');
        
        delete_transient('secure_auth_errors');
        delete_transient('secure_auth_success');
        
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="secure-auth-form">
            <?php if ($errors): ?>
                <div class="secure-auth-errors">
                    <?php foreach ($errors as $error): ?>
                        <p style="color: red;"><?php echo esc_html($error); ?></p>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>
            
            <?php if ($success): ?>
                <div class="secure-auth-success">
                    <p style="color: green;"><?php echo esc_html($success); ?></p>
                </div>
            <?php endif; ?>
            
            <form method="post" action="">
                <?php wp_nonce_field('secure_auth_login_action', 'secure_auth_login_nonce'); ?>
                
                <p>
                    <label for="username">Username:</label><br>
                    <input type="text" name="username" id="username" required>
                </p>
                
                <p>
                    <label for="password">Password:</label><br>
                    <input type="password" name="password" id="password" required>
                </p>
                
                <p>
                    <input type="submit" name="secure_auth_login" value="Login">
                </p>
            </form>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }
}

new SecureUserAuthentication();
